uses: Chariessa suaveolens is a plant species used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world. Its leaves, roots, or other parts are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. In some cultures, it's believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal uses.
